title: When I am Weak

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Blessed is the one who sees the broken
Who stops to help when others walk away
In times of trouble, they will find protection
Grace will be their shelter day by day

sections.label: Chorus
lines: When I am weak, You make me stronger
When I am lost, You lead me home
Though enemies whisper lies against me
In Your mercy, I am never alone
(In Your mercy, I am whole)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Even trusted friends may turn against me
Breaking bread while harboring deceit
But You, O Lord, remain forever faithful
Lifting me back onto my feet

sections.label: Chorus
lines: When I am weak, You make me stronger
When I am lost, You lead me home
Though enemies whisper lies against me
In Your mercy, I am never alone
(In Your mercy, I am whole)

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Your love upholds me Your truth enfolds me
Through every valley,
every storm You restore my soul

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: When I am weak, You make me stronger
When I am lost, You lead me home
Though enemies whisper lies against me
In Your mercy, I am never alone
In Your mercy, I am whole

epigraph: hath lifted up his heel against me
